    },
    {
      "url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7883.md",

      "type": "Standards Track / Core",
      "status": "Final",

      "_source_file": "outputs/01a_STATE.json"
    }
  ],
  "total_items": 2
}

Result:
Here is the extraction result for EIP-7825:

```json
{
  "source_url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7825.md",
  "title": "EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap",
  "sub_graphs": [
    {
      "id": "SG-001",
      "name": "txpool_gas_limit_validation",
      "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-001_txpool_gas_limit_validation.mmd",
      "program_graph": {
        "Q": ["q_init", "q_receive", "q_check", "q_reject", "q_accept", "q_final"],
        "q_init": "q_init",
        "q_final": "q_final",
        "Act": [
          "receive transaction tx",
          "gas_limit = tx.gasLimit",
          "gas_limit > 16777216",
          "gas_limit <= 16777216",
          "reject tx (MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)",
          "add tx to txpool"
        ],
        "E": [
          ["q_init", "receive transaction tx", "q_receive"],
          ["q_receive", "gas_limit = tx.gasLimit", "q_check"],
          ["q_check", "gas_limit > 16777216", "q_reject"],
          ["q_check", "gas_limit <= 16777216", "q_accept"],
          ["q_reject", "reject tx (MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)", "q_final"],
          ["q_accept", "add tx to txpool", "q_final"]
        ]
      },
      "invariants": [
        "INV-001: GAS_CAP = 16777216 (2^24) is a protocol constant",
        "INV-002: No transaction with gasLimit > GAS_CAP may enter the txpool",
        "INV-003: The gas cap is independent of the block gas limit"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "SG-002",
      "name": "block_validation_gas_cap",
      "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-002_block_validation_gas_cap.mmd",
      "program_graph": {
        "Q": ["q_init", "q_iter", "q_check", "q_next", "q_invalid", "q_valid", "q_final"],
        "q_init": "q_init",
        "q_final": "q_final",
        "Act": [
          "receive block B",
          "txs = B.transactions, i = 0",
          "i < len(txs)",
          "i >= len(txs)",
          "txs[i].gasLimit > 16777216",
          "txs[i].gasLimit <= 16777216",
          "i = i + 1",
          "reject block B as invalid",
          "accept block B (gas cap check passed)"
        ],
        "E": [
          ["q_init", "receive block B", "q_init"],
          ["q_init", "txs = B.transactions, i = 0", "q_iter"],
          ["q_iter", "i < len(txs)", "q_check"],
          ["q_iter", "i >= len(txs)", "q_valid"],
          ["q_check", "txs[i].gasLimit > 16777216", "q_invalid"],
          ["q_check", "txs[i].gasLimit <= 16777216", "q_next"],
          ["q_next", "i = i + 1", "q_iter"],
          ["q_invalid", "reject block B as invalid", "q_final"],
          ["q_valid", "accept block B (gas cap check passed)", "q_final"]
        ]
      },
      "invariants": [
        "INV-004: Every transaction in a valid block must have gasLimit <= 16777216",
        "INV-005: Block validation iterates over ALL transactions before acceptance",
        "INV-006: A single violating transaction invalidates the entire block"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "SG-003",
      "name": "transaction_gas_cap_enforcement",
      "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-003_transaction_gas_cap_enforcement.mmd",
      "program_graph": {
        "Q": ["q_init", "q_submit", "q_validate", "q_reject_pool", "q_pool", "q_pending", "q_block_check", "q_reject_block", "q_execute", "q_final"],
        "q_init": "q_init",
        "q_final": "q_final",
        "Act": [
          "user submits tx with gasLimit",
          "read tx.gasLimit",
          "tx.gasLimit > 16777216",
          "tx.gasLimit <= 16777216",
          "return error MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED",
          "tx added to txpool",
          "tx included in candidate block",
          "block-level gasLimit re-check fails",
          "block-level gasLimit re-check passes",
          "block rejected as invalid",
          "tx executed within block"
        ],
        "E": [
          ["q_init", "user submits tx with gasLimit", "q_submit"],
          ["q_submit", "read tx.gasLimit", "q_validate"],
          ["q_validate", "tx.gasLimit > 16777216", "q_reject_pool"],
          ["q_validate", "tx.gasLimit <= 16777216", "q_pool"],
          ["q_reject_pool", "return error MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED", "q_final"],
          ["q_pool", "tx added to txpool", "q_pending"],
          ["q_pending", "tx included in candidate block", "q_block_check"],
          ["q_block_check", "block-level gasLimit re-check fails", "q_reject_block"],
          ["q_block_check", "block-level gasLimit re-check passes", "q_execute"],
          ["q_reject_block", "block rejected as invalid", "q_final"],
          ["q_execute", "tx executed within block", "q_final"]
        ]
      },
      "invariants": [
        "INV-007: The gas cap is enforced at two layers - txpool and block validation",
        "INV-008: The cap value 16777216 is consistent across both enforcement points",
        "INV-009: A transaction rejected at txpool level never reaches block validation",
        "INV-010: The gas cap applies regardless of the block gas limit set by validators"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Summary

I extracted **3 program graphs** from **EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap**.

### Functional Units Identified

1. **SG-001: txpool_gas_limit_validation** -- Models the transaction pool validation step where incoming transactions are checked against the 16,777,216 (2^24) gas cap. Transactions exceeding the cap are rejected with `MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` before entering the mempool.

2. **SG-002: block_validation_gas_cap** -- Models the block-level validation loop that iterates over all transactions in a candidate block and rejects the entire block if any single transaction has `gasLimit > 16777216`. This is the second enforcement layer.

3. **SG-003: transaction_gas_cap_enforcement** -- Models the end-to-end lifecycle of a transaction through both enforcement layers: txpool validation, block inclusion, block-level re-check, and final execution. This captures the full two-tier defense described in the specification.

### Files Written

- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7825/SG-001_txpool_gas_limit_validation.mmd`
- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7825/SG-002_block_validation_gas_cap.mmd`
- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7825/SG-003_transaction_gas_cap_enforcement.mmd`

### Key Invariants Captured

- **INV-001 through INV-003**: The gas cap constant (2^24 = 16,777,216) is protocol-level and independent of block gas limit
- **INV-004 through INV-006**: Block validation requires ALL transactions to comply; a single violation invalidates the entire block
- **INV-007 through INV-010**: Two-tier enforcement (txpool + block validation) with consistent cap value at both layers

Result:
All files are created and valid. Here is the summary of the extraction:

---

## Subgraph Extraction Complete: EIP-7883 (ModExp Gas Cost Increase)

**Source**: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7883.md  
**Output directory**: `outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7883/`

### Functional Units Extracted: 3 Program Graphs

**SG-001: `calculate_multiplication_complexity`**
- Computes the multiplication complexity factor based on `base_length` and `modulus_length`.
- Key logic: sets a minimum complexity of 16, and doubles to `2 * words**2` when `max_length > 32`.
- 8 nodes, 8 edges.
- File: `EIP-7883/SG-001_calculate_multiplication_complexity.mmd`

**SG-002: `calculate_iteration_count`**
- Computes the iteration count based on `exponent_length` and `exponent` value.
- Three branches: (1) exponent_length <= 32 and exponent == 0 yields 1, (2) exponent_length <= 32 and exponent != 0 yields `bit_length - 1`, (3) exponent_length > 32 uses the formula with multiplier 16 (doubled from EIP-2565's value of 8).
- 8 nodes, 9 edges.
- File: `EIP-7883/SG-002_calculate_iteration_count.mmd`

**SG-003: `calculate_gas_cost`**
- Top-level orchestrator that calls the other two functions and applies `max(500, floor(complexity * iterations))`.
- Key change from EIP-2565: minimum raised from 200 to 500, division by 3 removed.
- 8 nodes, 8 edges.
- File: `EIP-7883/SG-003_calculate_gas_cost.mmd`

### Key Invariants Captured

| ID | Invariant |
|:---|:----------|
| SG-001/INV-001 | `multiplication_complexity >= 16` for all inputs |
| SG-001/INV-002 | If `max_length <= 32` then `multiplication_complexity == 16` |
| SG-001/INV-003 | If `max_length > 32` then `multiplication_complexity == 2 * ceil(max_length/8)**2` |
| SG-002/INV-001 | `iteration_count >= 1` for all non-trivial inputs |
| SG-002/INV-003 | Large exponent multiplier is 16 (doubled from EIP-2565) |
| SG-003/INV-001 | Gas cost >= 500 for all inputs |
| SG-003/INV-002 | Gas cost is not divided by 3 (change from EIP-2565) |

### Files Produced

- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7883/SG-001_calculate_multiplication_complexity.mmd`
- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7883/SG-002_calculate_iteration_count.mmd`
- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7883/SG-003_calculate_gas_cost.mmd`
- `/home/gohan/ga-runners/actions-runner-security-agent-3/_work/security-agent/security-agent/outputs/graphs/W1B2_1770272943/EIP-7883/result.json`

input.content:
{
  "specs": [
    {
      "source_url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7825.md",
      "title": "EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap",
      "sub_graphs": [
        {
          "id": "SG-001",
          "name": "txpool_gas_limit_validation",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-001_txpool_gas_limit_validation.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_receive", "q_check", "q_reject", "q_accept", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "receive transaction tx",
              "gas_limit = tx.gasLimit",
              "gas_limit > 16777216",
              "gas_limit <= 16777216",
              "reject tx (MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)",
              "add tx to txpool"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "receive transaction tx", "q_receive"],
              ["q_receive", "gas_limit = tx.gasLimit", "q_check"],
              ["q_check", "gas_limit > 16777216", "q_reject"],
              ["q_check", "gas_limit <= 16777216", "q_accept"],
              ["q_reject", "reject tx (MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)", "q_final"],
              ["q_accept", "add tx to txpool", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: GAS_CAP = 16777216 (2^24) is a protocol constant",
            "INV-002: No transaction with gasLimit > GAS_CAP may enter the txpool",
            "INV-003: The gas cap is independent of the block gas limit"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-002",
          "name": "block_validation_gas_cap",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-002_block_validation_gas_cap.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_iter", "q_check", "q_next", "q_invalid", "q_valid", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "receive block B",
              "txs = B.transactions, i = 0",
              "i < len(txs)",
              "i >= len(txs)",
              "txs[i].gasLimit > 16777216",
              "txs[i].gasLimit <= 16777216",
              "i = i + 1",
              "reject block B as invalid",
              "accept block B (gas cap check passed)"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "receive block B", "q_init"],
              ["q_init", "txs = B.transactions, i = 0", "q_iter"],
              ["q_iter", "i < len(txs)", "q_check"],
              ["q_iter", "i >= len(txs)", "q_valid"],
              ["q_check", "txs[i].gasLimit > 16777216", "q_invalid"],
              ["q_check", "txs[i].gasLimit <= 16777216", "q_next"],
              ["q_next", "i = i + 1", "q_iter"],
              ["q_invalid", "reject block B as invalid", "q_final"],
              ["q_valid", "accept block B (gas cap check passed)", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-004: Every transaction in a valid block must have gasLimit <= 16777216",
            "INV-005: Block validation iterates over ALL transactions before acceptance",
            "INV-006: A single violating transaction invalidates the entire block"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-003",
          "name": "transaction_gas_cap_enforcement",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7825/SG-003_transaction_gas_cap_enforcement.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_submit", "q_validate", "q_reject_pool", "q_pool", "q_pending", "q_block_check", "q_reject_block", "q_execute", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "user submits tx with gasLimit",
              "read tx.gasLimit",
              "tx.gasLimit > 16777216",
              "tx.gasLimit <= 16777216",
              "return error MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED",
              "tx added to txpool",
              "tx included in candidate block",
              "block-level gasLimit re-check fails",
              "block-level gasLimit re-check passes",
              "block rejected as invalid",
              "tx executed within block"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "user submits tx with gasLimit", "q_submit"],
              ["q_submit", "read tx.gasLimit", "q_validate"],
              ["q_validate", "tx.gasLimit > 16777216", "q_reject_pool"],
              ["q_validate", "tx.gasLimit <= 16777216", "q_pool"],
              ["q_reject_pool", "return error MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED", "q_final"],
              ["q_pool", "tx added to txpool", "q_pending"],
              ["q_pending", "tx included in candidate block", "q_block_check"],
              ["q_block_check", "block-level gasLimit re-check fails", "q_reject_block"],
              ["q_block_check", "block-level gasLimit re-check passes", "q_execute"],
              ["q_reject_block", "block rejected as invalid", "q_final"],
              ["q_execute", "tx executed within block", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-007: The gas cap is enforced at two layers - txpool and block validation",
            "INV-008: The cap value 16777216 is consistent across both enforcement points",
            "INV-009: A transaction rejected at txpool level never reaches block validation",
            "INV-010: The gas cap applies regardless of the block gas limit set by validators"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "source_url": "https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-7883.md",
      "title": "EIP-7883: ModExp Gas Cost Increase",
      "sub_graphs": [
        {
          "id": "SG-001",
          "name": "calculate_multiplication_complexity",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7883/SG-001_calculate_multiplication_complexity.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_read", "q_max", "q_branch", "q_small", "q_large", "q_compute", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "read base_length, modulus_length",
              "max_length = max(base_length, modulus_length)",
              "max_length <= 32",
              "max_length > 32",
              "multiplication_complexity = 16",
              "words = ceil(max_length / 8)",
              "multiplication_complexity = 2 * words^2",
              "return multiplication_complexity"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "read base_length, modulus_length", "q_read"],
              ["q_read", "max_length = max(base_length, modulus_length)", "q_max"],
              ["q_max", "max_length <= 32", "q_small"],
              ["q_max", "max_length > 32", "q_large"],
              ["q_small", "multiplication_complexity = 16", "q_final"],
              ["q_large", "words = ceil(max_length / 8)", "q_compute"],
              ["q_compute", "multiplication_complexity = 2 * words^2", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: multiplication_complexity >= 16 for all inputs",
            "INV-002: If max_length <= 32 then multiplication_complexity == 16",
            "INV-003: If max_length > 32 then multiplication_complexity == 2 * ceil(max_length/8)^2"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-002",
          "name": "calculate_iteration_count",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7883/SG-002_calculate_iteration_count.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_read", "q_branch1", "q_zero", "q_nonzero", "q_large", "q_compute_large", "q_apply_mult", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "read exponent_length, exponent",
              "exponent_length <= 32",
              "exponent_length > 32",
              "exponent == 0",
              "exponent != 0",
              "iteration_count = 1",
              "iteration_count = bit_length(exponent) - 1",
              "iteration_count = 16 * (exponent_length - 32) + bit_length(top_32_bytes)",
              "iteration_count = max(iteration_count, 1)",
              "return iteration_count"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "read exponent_length, exponent", "q_read"],
              ["q_read", "exponent_length <= 32", "q_branch1"],
              ["q_read", "exponent_length > 32", "q_large"],
              ["q_branch1", "exponent == 0", "q_zero"],
              ["q_branch1", "exponent != 0", "q_nonzero"],
              ["q_zero", "iteration_count = 1", "q_final"],
              ["q_nonzero", "iteration_count = bit_length(exponent) - 1", "q_final"],
              ["q_large", "iteration_count = 16 * (exponent_length - 32) + bit_length(top_32_bytes)", "q_compute_large"],
              ["q_compute_large", "iteration_count = max(iteration_count, 1)", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: iteration_count >= 1 for all non-trivial inputs",
            "INV-002: For exponent_length <= 32 and exponent == 0, iteration_count == 1",
            "INV-003: Large exponent multiplier is 16 (doubled from EIP-2565 value of 8)"
          ]
        },
        {
          "id": "SG-003",
          "name": "calculate_gas_cost",
          "mermaid_file": "EIP-7883/SG-003_calculate_gas_cost.mmd",
          "program_graph": {
            "Q": ["q_init", "q_complexity", "q_iterations", "q_product", "q_floor", "q_clamp", "q_check", "q_min", "q_final"],
            "q_init": "q_init",
            "q_final": "q_final",
            "Act": [
              "read base_length, modulus_length, exponent_length, exponent",
              "complexity = calculate_multiplication_complexity(base_length, modulus_length)",
              "iterations = calculate_iteration_count(exponent_length, exponent)",
              "raw_cost = complexity * iterations",
              "gas = floor(raw_cost)",
              "gas < 500",
              "gas >= 500",
              "gas = 500",
              "return gas"
            ],
            "E": [
              ["q_init", "read base_length, modulus_length, exponent_length, exponent", "q_complexity"],
              ["q_complexity", "complexity = calculate_multiplication_complexity(base_length, modulus_length)", "q_iterations"],
              ["q_iterations", "iterations = calculate_iteration_count(exponent_length, exponent)", "q_product"],
              ["q_product", "raw_cost = complexity * iterations", "q_floor"],
              ["q_floor", "gas = floor(raw_cost)", "q_clamp"],
              ["q_clamp", "gas < 500", "q_min"],
              ["q_clamp", "gas >= 500", "q_final"],
              ["q_min", "gas = 500", "q_final"]
            ]
          },
          "invariants": [
            "INV-001: Gas cost >= 500 for all inputs (minimum raised from 200)",
            "INV-002: Gas cost = max(500, floor(complexity * iterations)), no division by 3"
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
